final_blocker_impact: Does not close predictive-wall-test-section-submodels by itself. It removes cooler-duty magnitude as the leading uncertainty only after coupled rows are reviewed.
fixed_mdot_segmented_duty_status: pending_native_or_replay_runner; not invented from coupled totals
selection_basis: Constant-UA reproduces the prior split-legal Salt2-fit duty screen: Salt3 abs error 2.869104004 W and Salt4 abs error 7.502618613 W.
